error_analysis.total_count: fields @timestamp | filter @message like /(?i)(error|fail|exception|critical)/ | stats count() as total_errors
error_analysis.by_message: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /(?i)(error|fail|exception|critical)/ | stats count() as error_count by @message | sort error_count desc | limit 50
error_analysis.unique_errors: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /(?i)(error|fail|exception|critical)/ and @message not like /file already closed/ | stats count() as error_count by @message | sort error_count desc | limit 20
error_analysis.hourly_distribution: fields @timestamp | filter @message like /(?i)(error|fail|exception|critical)/ | stats count() as error_count by bin(1h)
error_analysis.recent_errors: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /(?i)(error|fail|exception|critical)/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 100

performance_analysis.slow_requests: fields @timestamp, duration, request_id | filter duration > 1000 | sort duration desc | limit 20
performance_analysis.latency_percentiles: fields @timestamp, duration | stats avg(duration), pct(duration, 50), pct(duration, 90), pct(duration, 99) by bin(5m)
performance_analysis.requests_per_minute: fields @timestamp | stats count() as request_count by bin(1m)

request_tracing.by_user: fields @timestamp, @message | parse @message '"user":"*"' as user | filter user = "USER_ID" | sort @timestamp asc

application_monitoring.status_codes: fields @timestamp, status_code | stats count() as count by status_code | sort count desc
application_monitoring.error_rate: fields @timestamp, @message | stats count() as total, sum(@message like /(?i)error/) as errors | fields errors / total * 100 as error_rate
application_monitoring.top_endpoints: fields @timestamp, endpoint | stats count() as count by endpoint | sort count desc | limit 20
